title: You are main-orchestrator. summary_text: {"risk":"MEDIUM","approve":false,"findings":["Issue scope is ambiguous: \"codex main strict lane\" is not defined.","No reproducible test procedure is provided (environment, branch/commit, commands).","No explicit acceptance criteria or required evidence (logs, CI link, screenshot) is specified."],"recommendation":"Hold approval until the issue includes a concrete smoke-test checklist, target environment, and pass/fail criteria; then run the check and attach proof.","rationale":"This is likely a low-complexity verification task, but the current issue lacks enough detail to execute reliably or confirm completion objectively."}
